name: consciousness-council
tagline: Runs a multi-persona 'council' debate (12 archetypes) to produce a synthesized recommendation on tough decisions.
verdict: No malicious behavior found: pure prompting/roleplay skill, no network calls, no shell execution, no secret handling. Only nit: frontmatter declares allowed-tools 'Read Write' but the skill body never describes reading or writing any file — an unused/unexplained permission grant a user should notice, though low risk on its own. Otherwise clean and well struc

Declared allowed-tools 'Read Write' (line 4) is never justified or used by the skill's actual instructions, which describe only conversational output — mismatched/unexplained tool declaration.
